title: Og Menu Background
description: Bring back the old dirt background instead of the transparency effect added in 1.20.5
body:
Bring back the old dirt menu background![How the menu looks with the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfdebe1b7cb2a4ce53b766d4b690d47ab7d4b4ef.png)



The dirt texture is made by Mojang, respective EULA and license applies
